subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the contingent realm! By the truth of God, the All-Merciful hath come with a sovereignty that encompasseth all who are in the heavens and on the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الامکان تالله الحق قد اتی الرحمن بسلطان احاط من فی السموات و الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @belief and denial, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
